reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, verified status, sent a message, and received a response containing "4" within seconds
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with title "Gamut"
Found the "QA-20260624-215322-962t" agent in the sidebar — Agent was visible with status indicator showing "idle"
Clicked the "QA-20260624-215322-962t" agent link — Successfully navigated to agent page at /agents/qa-20260624-215322-962t-h90uyi
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status shows "idle" in the top header area, which meets requirements
Clicked the message input field — Input field became active and focused
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message text appeared in the input field
Clicked the send button — Message was sent and a new chat session was created titled "Basic Math Question Session"
Waited for response — Agent responded almost immediately (worked for 1s)
Verified response mentions "4" — Response displays "4" as the answer to the math question, exactly as expected
Took final screenshot — Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
